title: Pull The Lever Kronk!
description:
WRONG LEVAAAAAAAAA!
This Modpack is designed to run as fast as possible, containing may tasty optimizations.
body:
**_"Oh yeah, it's all coming together." - Kronk, The Emperor's New Groove (2000)_**

This modpack will only get you so far, if you are using a netbook from 2009, this will not be very helpful.

This modpack was assembled out of a desire to be able to use shaders with my almost 7 year old GPU, so it should work for you as well.

**Take care, and happy mining!**
